author: Joshua Bronson
message:
Add python-lsp-ruff settings to pylsp schema (#1168)

The pylsp schema is used by the jupyterlab-lsp frontend to validate
settings from overrides.json before sending them to the LSP server.
Settings whose keys are not present in the schema are silently dropped.

Since the schema had no entries for python-lsp-ruff, settings like
`pylsp.plugins.ruff.executable`, `pylsp.plugins.ruff.lineLength`, etc.
were never forwarded to pylsp, even when correctly specified in
overrides.json.

Add all python-lsp-ruff settings to the schema so they are forwarded
to pylsp as expected.

Ref: https://github.com/python-lsp/python-lsp-ruff

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Co-authored-by: Michał Krassowski <5832902+krassowski@users.noreply.github.com>
